schedule-grid.title: Time schedule instructions
schedule-grid.guideStep1: Add a new row using the add row button.
schedule-grid.guideStep2: Enter a value (in minutes) in the delay column.
schedule-grid.guideStep3: Pick a mail template to be used, be sure this mail template contains valid HTML and no illegal variables.
schedule-grid.instructions: The time schedule table is used to configure when and which mail should be send for the abandoned cart. The schedule works from the top down which means that the first delay will be the initial delay to be used to send the abandoned cart mail. Following delays will be timed from the time the last mail was send. You can delete one or multiple rows by selecting the checkbox. A "Delete" button will appear which allows you to delete the selection. Your changes will be permanent once you hit the "Save" button in the top right.
schedule-grid.delayLabel: Delay (before initial/after previous mail in minutes)
schedule-grid.contextDisabled: Double click the row to edit.

promotionUpdate.title: Promotion discount value update instructions
promotionUpdate.guideStep1: When promotion is used the discount can no longer be modified, So here you can update the discount value only.
promotionUpdate.guideStep2: Select the default promotion 'Abandoned cart promotion'.
promotionUpdate.guideStep3: Enter the discount value in numeric or decimal format.
